title: Epstein Network Deep Dive Matrix
purpose: A deeper public-record tracker for people/entities, dates, locations, flight/logistics references, institutional overlap, reputation-management signals, and deep-state-adjacent power-structure questions. This file is designed for evidence mapping, not guilt-by-association.
boundary: This matrix tracks public-record mentions, court records, congressional releases, reported emails, flight/contact records, institutional roles, properties, logistics, and chronology. A name, flight, contact, meeting, location, or email is not proof of criminal conduct. Use evidenceClass, sourceType, and claimBoundary before making any claim.
sourceHierarchy: Court docket / sworn testimony / conviction / plea
Congressional release / official archive / DOJ disclosure
Flight log / contact book / calendar / visitor record
Major dated reporting that links to underlying documents
Open question / unverified claim / speculation quarantine

locations.name: Palm Beach, Florida
locations.whyItMatters: Epstein's Palm Beach property is central to his conviction history, survivor allegations, local prosecution failures, elite proximity, and the Acosta non-prosecution agreement context.
locations.recordUse: Map dates, visitors, staff, law-enforcement contacts, plea-deal timeline, and public officials who handled the case.
locations.boundary: A person being in Palm Beach or socially proximate to Epstein is not proof of criminal conduct. Track exact date, source, and purpose.

locations.name: Little St James, U.S. Virgin Islands
locations.type: Private island / logistics and allegations hub
locations.whyItMatters: The island is repeatedly referenced in public reporting, civil claims, flight logistics, and trafficking allegations.
locations.recordUse: Map flight legs, guest references, staff testimony, corporate ownership, local political/regulatory relationships, and civil claims.
locations.boundary: Separate verified travel/property records from allegations and from proven conduct.

locations.name: New York City mansion
locations.whyItMatters: The Manhattan property is tied to elite meetings, contact books, finance/social access, law-enforcement searches, and media narratives.
locations.recordUse: Map meetings, reported visitors, property ownership history, contact-book links, and seizure/search records.
locations.boundary: Presence, contact, or social introduction must not be converted into criminal proof.

locations.name: Zorro Ranch, New Mexico
locations.type: Ranch / isolated property and travel hub
locations.whyItMatters: The ranch appears in Epstein reporting and allegation timelines and is relevant to isolated-property logistics.
locations.recordUse: Map property ownership, state/local political contacts, flight logs, staff references, and claims requiring primary-source support.
locations.boundary: Treat all specific conduct claims as claim-classified items.

locations.name: Paris, France apartment
locations.whyItMatters: The Paris property is relevant to international movement, law-enforcement coordination, and elite social proximity.
locations.recordUse: Map travel records, property records, arrests/searches, visitors when supported by documents, and cross-border legal events.
locations.boundary: Do not infer purpose from travel alone.

locations.name: Teterboro / West Palm Beach / St Thomas aviation corridor
locations.whyItMatters: Private aviation is one of the clearest logistics trails: aircraft, passengers, legs, dates, and property access can be cross-checked.
locations.recordUse: Use flight logs to build date/person/location overlays and ask who was on the same route within the same window.
locations.boundary: Flight-log presence is an association record, not a finding of wrongdoing.

networkLanes.title: Law Enforcement / Prosecution / Plea Deal Lane
networkLanes.question: Which public officials, prosecutors, agencies, and offices handled Epstein decisions, redactions, plea negotiations, jail custody, releases, and disclosure disputes?
networkLanes.deepStateOverlapQuestion: Does the record show institutional protection, bureaucratic failure, prosecutorial discretion, intelligence-adjacent silence, or ordinary legal failure? Label which one the evidence supports.

networkLanes.title: Finance / Legitimacy / Elite Access Lane
networkLanes.question: Who helped Epstein obtain money, credibility, philanthropy cover, bank access, tax/legal structure, or reputation repair?
networkLanes.deepStateOverlapQuestion: Does the record show money laundering, social laundering, institutional normalization, or merely elite proximity?

networkLanes.title: Media / Reputation Management / Narrative Lane
networkLanes.question: Which journalists, authors, publicists, lawyers, and political operatives appear in reputation-management or media-strategy records?
networkLanes.deepStateOverlapQuestion: Does the record show narrative shaping around power, political shielding, blackmail risk, or ordinary press management?

networkLanes.title: Political / Policy / Intelligence-Adjacent Access Lane
networkLanes.question: Which politicians, former officials, policy advisors, academic-policy figures, diplomats, or intelligence-adjacent people appear in records?
networkLanes.deepStateOverlapQuestion: Map whether the connection is policy access, social access, intelligence-adjacent overlap, donor influence, or unsupported internet lore.

networkLanes.title: Private Jet / Property / Logistics Lane
networkLanes.question: Which flights, properties, staff, calendars, guest references, and travel corridors line up with people/entity records?
networkLanes.deepStateOverlapQuestion: Look for repeated patterns and timing overlaps, not single coincidences.

peopleToAddOrDeepen.name: Bill Clinton
peopleToAddOrDeepen.type: Former president / flight and association lane
peopleToAddOrDeepen.evidenceClass: Flight/log/contact record / public denial / association lane
peopleToAddOrDeepen.recordFocus: Flight-log references, reported travel, foundation/social access, public denials, and timeline overlap with Epstein properties and aircraft.
locationsToTrack: U.S. Virgin Islands claims requiring source separation
peopleToAddOrDeepen.claimBoundary: Flight or contact records prove association/travel where documented; they do not by themselves prove knowledge of crimes or participation.

peopleToAddOrDeepen.name: Donald Trump
peopleToAddOrDeepen.type: President / public figure / email, association and contradiction lane
peopleToAddOrDeepen.evidenceClass: Email record / public denial / contradiction lane
peopleToAddOrDeepen.recordFocus: Emails involving Epstein, Michael Wolff and Maxwell; public denials; Palm Beach social proximity; disclosure politics; and the Epstein Files Transparency Act timeline.
peopleToAddOrDeepen.claimBoundary: Emails and association records support questions about knowledge, access and contradiction; they do not prove Trump committed a crime.

peopleToAddOrDeepen.name: Peter Thiel
peopleToAddOrDeepen.evidenceClass: Reported congressional-release meeting reference / elite network lane
peopleToAddOrDeepen.recordFocus: Track reported references to meetings or planned meetings, technology-finance access, political network adjacency, and document-release source.
locationsToTrack: New York / elite meeting circuit when documented
peopleToAddOrDeepen.claimBoundary: A meeting reference is not criminal evidence. It is an elite-access signal requiring date, source and document context.

peopleToAddOrDeepen.name: Steve Bannon
peopleToAddOrDeepen.type: Political/media strategist / meeting and interview lane
peopleToAddOrDeepen.recordFocus: Track reported references to meetings, interviews, film/media projects, and political narrative overlap around Epstein disclosures.
locationsToTrack: New York / media meeting circuit when documented
peopleToAddOrDeepen.claimBoundary: Media or meeting records do not prove involvement in Epstein crimes.

peopleToAddOrDeepen.name: Kathryn Ruemmler
peopleToAddOrDeepen.type: Former White House Counsel / legal-policy correspondence lane
peopleToAddOrDeepen.recordFocus: Track reported Epstein emails involving legal/political commentary, elite-policy proximity, and post-government access networks.
locationsToTrack: Email/correspondence lane rather than travel lane unless supported by records
peopleToAddOrDeepen.claimBoundary: Email correspondence is a record of contact and content; it is not proof of criminal participation.

peopleToAddOrDeepen.name: Landon Thomas Jr.
peopleToAddOrDeepen.recordFocus: Track reported correspondence about Epstein image, media strategy, reputation management and elite access.
peopleToAddOrDeepen.claimBoundary: Media contact or discussion is not criminal evidence.

peopleToAddOrDeepen.name: Peggy Siegal
peopleToAddOrDeepen.type: Publicist / social access and reputation lane
peopleToAddOrDeepen.recordFocus: Track publicist/social access, reputation repair, event networks and public-response strategy.
locationsToTrack: New York social/event circuit when documented
peopleToAddOrDeepen.claimBoundary: Public relations or social access is not proof of criminal conduct.

peopleToAddOrDeepen.name: Matthew Menchel
peopleToAddOrDeepen.type: Former Miami federal prosecutor / post-plea meeting-reference lane
peopleToAddOrDeepen.recordFocus: Track reported personal meetings with Epstein after the 2007 plea-deal period and compare against prosecutorial-role timelines.
locationsToTrack: Miami / New York where documents support
peopleToAddOrDeepen.claimBoundary: A reported meeting is an institutional conflict/appearance question, not proof of corruption without more evidence.

dateAnchors.whyTrack: Core institutional-failure node: prosecutors, victims' rights issues, local/federal boundaries and later scrutiny.

dateAnchors.event: Epstein arrest, custody, death and immediate media/political fallout
dateAnchors.whyTrack: Central custody/death/disclosure node. Track official records, surveillance/custody failures and public claims separately.

dateAnchors.event: House Oversight / Epstein estate / DOJ release escalation
dateAnchors.whyTrack: Major document-release window with people/email references, political pressure and disclosure conflict.

dateAnchors.event: Reported email release involving Trump/Wolff/Maxwell references
dateAnchors.whyTrack: Important contradiction/media/knowledge lane. Needs careful source text and denial context.
Official disclosure-pressure node connecting Congress, White House, DOJ and release deadlines.

dateAnchors.event: Judge orders DOJ to release more Epstein records or justify redactions by July 2, 2026
dateAnchors.whyTrack: Fresh legal pressure on redactions and withheld records.

privateJetTrackerRules: Track aircraft tail number only when sourced from flight logs or official/reputable document archives.
For each flight, store date, origin, destination, passenger names as written, source, confidence, and evidence boundary.
Never state that a passenger committed a crime because of a flight. Use association/travel language unless court records support more.
Flag repeated corridors and same-window overlaps for research, not as proof.
Separate verified flight logs from social-media flight claims and sighting claims.
deepStateFramingRules: Use 'institutional overlap', 'state-power overlap', 'intelligence-adjacent', 'prosecutorial failure', 'political-access lane', or 'elite-protection question' instead of presenting an unsupported 'deep state' conclusion.
A deep-state score must be an editorial research signal only, based on public role, institutional power, record proximity, secrecy/redaction relevance, and legal/disclosure involvement.
Never use the score as proof of guilt.

sourceDoors.label: TIME people named in email release
